name: swarm
description: Local-First, Federated Multi-Agent Framework for automating software engineering workflows

scripts.dev:router: node --env-file=.env bin/kill-port.js ROUTER_PORT && node --env-file=.env --import tsx/esm --watch src/router/index.ts
scripts.dev:api: npm run db:migrate && node --env-file=.env bin/kill-port.js API_PORT && node --env-file=.env --import tsx/esm --watch src/api/server.ts
scripts.dev:worker: npm run db:migrate && node --env-file=.env --import tsx/esm src/worker/index.ts
scripts.dev:worker:watch: npm run db:migrate && node --env-file=.env --import tsx/esm --watch src/worker/index.ts
scripts.dev:worker:seed: npm run db:seed && npm run dev:worker
scripts.start:api: npm run build:dashboard && npm run dev:api
scripts.reload: npm install && npm --prefix dashboard install && npm run build:dashboard && npm run db:migrate && echo '[reload] deps synced, dashboard rebuilt (served live by the running API), migrations applied. Restart the worker (npm run dev:worker) and rebuild the router (docker compose up -d --build router) if their code changed.'
scripts.worker: npm run build && npm run start:worker
scripts.test: vitest run --project unit && npm run test:dashboard
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test

author: Jacek Kwiecien
